title: Buckling of elastomer-embedded thermoplastic microspheres under uniaxial compression revealed by in-situ X-ray micro-CT
abstract: Communications Materials, Published online: 05 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s43246-026-01214-w Glass microspheres are commonly used in syntactic foams but can fracture, leading to a loss in the bulk mechanical properties. title: Stoichiometry-based machine learning enables discovery of new salt hydration reactions for thermochemical heat storage
abstract: Communications Materials, Published online: 05 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s43246-026-01200-2 Reversible hydration reactions of solid salts are promising for sustainable heat storage. Here, a robust machine-learning framework predicts key salt-hydration thermodynamic properties from chemical composition.
